summary: This pack is the smallest truthful browser-backed public trust bundle for page_brief today. It combines the tracked healthy proof summary, a bundle baseline summary, a share-ready Workflow Case recap, and the shared storefront demo-status ledger without claiming that page_brief replaced news_digest as the official first public baseline.
known_gaps: page_brief is still not the official first public baseline; news_digest retains that role.
The current page_brief bundle does not prove hosted production readiness, broad multi-run benchmark coverage, or public write-capable MCP.
